positive: A breathtaking, maximalist digital illustration featuring a celestial forest scene. The composition is centered and designed for apparel print, showing stylized bioluminescent flora, glowing root systems, and crescent moons entwined with detailed, mythical ferns and stardust. The color palette is dominated by deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and touches of glowing gold and amethyst. Emphasize strong, graphic silhouettes and high contrast, giving it an enchanted, whimsical gothic aesthetic. Highly detailed linework, symmetrical composition, studio quality lighting, vector art style.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, artifact, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, poorly drawn, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, muted colors
